creator: smyru@heron.pl
text:
Attempted to do a system upgrade today after csuping sources from RELENG_8. Looks like files are missing from the csupable tree.

How-To-Repeat: # cat ~/CVS/source.cvsup
*default release=cvs tag=RELENG_8
*default host=cvsup.uk.freebsd.org
*default prefix=/usr
*default base=/var/db
*default delete use-rel-suffix compress
src-all

# csup -gL2 ~/CVS/source.cvsup
Parsing supfile "/root/CVS/source.cvsup"
Connecting to cvsup.uk.freebsd.org
Cannot connect to 2001:630:200:8080:20e:cff:fe09:a69c: Protocol not supported
Connected to 131.111.8.41
Server software version: SNAP_16_1h
Negotiating file attribute support
Exchanging collection information
Establishing multiplexed-mode data connection
Running
Updating collection src-all/cvs
 Edit src/sys/fs/nfsserver/nfs_nfsdstate.c
  Add delta 1.10.2.14 2010.10.25.17.05.14 rmacklem
Shutting down connection to server
Finished successfully

# make buildkernel
awk -f /usr/src/sys/tools/makeobjops.awk /usr/src/sys/kern/linker_if.m -h
awk -f /usr/src/sys/tools/makeobjops.awk /usr/src/sys/kern/serdev_if.m -h
awk -f /usr/src/sys/tools/makeobjops.awk /usr/src/sys/dev/acpica/acpi_if.m -h
awk -f /usr/src/sys/tools/makeobjops.awk /usr/src/sys/dev/acpi_support/acpi_wmi_if.m -h
rm -f .newdep
/usr/obj/usr/src/make.amd64/make -V CFILES -V SYSTEM_CFILES -V GEN_CFILES |  MKDEP_CPP="cc -E" CC="cc" xargs mkdep -a -f .newdep -O2 -frename-registers -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing  -std=c99  -Wall -Wredundant-decls -Wnested-externs -Wstrict-prototypes  -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Winline -Wcast-qual  -Wundef -Wno-pointer-sign -fformat-extensions -nostdinc  -I. -I/usr/src/sys -I/usr/src/sys/contrib/altq -I/usr/src/sys/contrib/ipfilter -I/usr/src/sys/contrib/pf -I/usr/src/sys/dev/ath -I/usr/src/sys/dev/ath/ath_hal -I/usr/src/sys/contrib/ngatm -I/usr/src/sys/dev/twa -I/usr/src/sys/gnu/fs/xfs/FreeBSD -I/usr/src/sys/gnu/fs/xfs/FreeBSD/support -I/usr/src/sys/gnu/fs/xfs -I/usr/src/sys/contrib/opensolaris/compat -I/usr/src/sys/dev/cxgb -D_KERNEL -DHAVE_KERNEL_OPTION_HEADERS -include opt_global.h -fno-common -finline-limit=8000 --param inline-unit-growth=100 --param large-function-growth=1000  -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mcmodel=kernel -mno-red-zone  -mfpmath=387 -mno-sse -mno-s
 se2 -mno-sse3 -mno-mmx -mno-3dnow  -msoft-float -fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables -ffreestanding -fstack-protector
cc: /usr/src/sys/libkern/inet_ntop.c: No such file or directory
cc: /usr/src/sys/libkern/inet_pton.c: No such file or directory
mkdep: compile failed
*** Error code 1

Stop in /home/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/SMYRU.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src.

# ll usr/src/sys/libkern/inet_{ntop,pton}.c
ls: usr/src/sys/libkern/inet_ntop.c: No such file or directory
ls: usr/src/sys/libkern/inet_pton.c: No such file or directory
